name: goalpost
description: Plan a project as a stage x goal roadmap with hard per-goal acceptance gates, then run it hands-off: a persistent ledger drives an orchestrator that delegates engineering goals to the Codex MCP (right-sized across GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna by task blast-radius) and creative/marketing goals to Claude Code, verifying every goal's Definition of Done before advancing, escalating a tier on failure, isolating destructive operations behind approval gates, and stopping only at genuine human-decision gates.
